pr.title: feat(search): add fuzzy match operator (closes #1014)
pr.body:
Adds a `~` fuzzy-match operator to the search parser. Implementation lives in `src/search/parser.py`; behavior is covered by table-driven tests in `tests/test_parser.py`. README and the `docs/search.md` reference are updated with the new operator.

Closes #1014. Benchmarked against the corpus from #1010; no regressions.
pr.author: octocat
